overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through an abandoned, overgrown urban area with brutalist concrete architecture. The clip transitions from a sunlit exterior with a burning car and graffiti-covered walls into a dark, cavernous interior space beneath a massive concrete structure.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the massive concrete structure ahead

entered.detail: damaged vehicle with smoke and fire coming from the engine compartment
massive angular concrete building with exposed beams and graffiti
concrete wall covered in colorful street art including NC tags
overgrown palm trees and bushes along the walkway edge
weathered concrete seating along the left pathway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a sunlit abandoned urban plaza with a burning wrecked car on the right. The camera walks forward toward a massive brutalist concrete structure covered in graffiti, with overgrown palm trees lining the left side of the path.

agents.ego_description: circling around the structure exterior and looking up at the architecture

entered.detail: futuristic high-rise buildings with neon accents visible in the distance
derelict yellow car sitting in the open area near the structure
staircase leading up the side of the concrete building

segments.scene_description: Moving along the exterior of the brutalist structure, the camera reveals a distant cyberpunk skyline with towering buildings. The path curves around the concrete mass, passing an abandoned yellow vehicle and exterior stairs while the sky becomes partially obscured by the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underbelly of concrete structure with scaffolding

events.description: entering dark interior space under the concrete structure with dramatic light falloff

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark interior beneath the structure, passing by scavengers

notable_agents.action: scavenger sitting on concrete barrier near orange scaffolding
worker in orange hard hat handling materials near metal shelving

entered.detail: rusted orange scaffolding structure with wooden planks
derelict red vehicle parked in the dark interior space
stacked concrete barriers near the scaffolding
industrial metal racks with various items

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dramatically darker space beneath the concrete structure, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadow. Orange scaffolding and concrete barriers line the right side where NPC scavengers are camped. A red abandoned car sits in the center of the dimly lit underbelly as the camera continues forward.

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs deeper into the structure toward the light streaming from above

entered.detail: large rectangular opening in the ceiling allowing bright light to stream down
silhouette of dead palm trees against the light from the skylight
elevated metal walkway with rusted railings

segments.scene_description: Ascending concrete stairs deeper into the structure's interior, the camera moves toward a dramatic skylight opening that casts beams of light down through the darkness. Dead palm trees stand silhouetted against the bright overhead light, and rusted metal catwalks are visible on the right as the space opens into a cavernous concrete hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit, overgrown urban plaza into the dark, cavernous depths of a brutalist concrete structure. It begins by walking past a burning wrecked car and palm trees toward a graffiti-covered concrete mass, eventually curving around the building to reveal a distant cyberpunk skyline. As the camera moves beneath the overhead structure, the bright daylight shifts abruptly into deep shadow, passing an abandoned red car and a camp of scavengers amidst orange scaffolding. The scene then ascends a set of concrete stairs, moving deeper into the interior where the darkness is pierced by beams of light from a dramatic skylight. Finally, the camera opens into a massive concrete hall, passing silhouetted dead palm trees and rusted metal catwalks under the overhead glow.
